_comment: eChan seed content — v1.3.1. Hand-editable; reload page to apply. Triggers: welcome:firstVisit, welcome:returning, time:morning|afternoon|evening|night, network:quiet|busy, idle:short, idle:long, random, manual, and v1.3.1 event triggers: event:block, event:blockfinal, event:bigtx (whale ≥1B XEC), event:sharktx (100M–1B XEC), event:fastttf, event:slowttf, event:blockdrought, event:fusion, event:watchlist, event:onchainmsg, event:trend:tps_up, event:trend:tps_down, event:trend:ttf_up, event:trend:ttf_down, event:trend:peak. Event lines may use template vars: {height} {txCount} {valueXec} {ttfMs} {pct} {peakTps} {watched} {msgType} {mins} — a line referencing a var the event doesn't carry is skipped. Emotions: neutral, happy, thinking, alert, celebrate, sleepy, studying, observing, shy, annoyed. Lines WITHOUT an emotion field inherit categoryDefaults[category]; an explicit emotion field overrides. priority: 1 shows in Chatty, 2 in Casual+, 3 always (announcements). v1.3.1 audit additions: optional per-line "requires" condition checked against live state (net:quiet | net:busy | net:notbusy | feed:up) — line is skipped when the condition isn't true right now. Live template vars usable in ANY line: {liveTps} {liveTtf} {tipHeight} — auto-skipped while data is stale.

lines.text: Hey 👋 I'm eChan — your eCash co-pilot. I'll comment on what the network's doing as it happens. Too talkative? Dial me down in settings ⚙️
Welcome back ✨ The chain's been ticking while you were away.
Hey, you're back. Let's see what's happening on-chain.
Morning ☀️ Coffee's brewing, blocks are landing. Let's see what XEC does today.
Early start? The mempool's still warming up.
Afternoon. Prime time to watch the flow 🌊
Evening 🌆 The chain hums on, regardless of the hour.
Burning the midnight oil? 🌙 The mempool's calm — nice time to read tx details without distraction.
Late shift. The chain doesn't sleep, even if you should 😉
Pre-consensus is what makes eCash feel instant 💡 Avalanche locks a tx in ~3s — long before it's buried in a block. No more 'wait for confirmations'.
How does pre-consensus work? Stakers vote on each tx before it's mined. ~3s later they all agree — and that's final. No reversals.
Post-consensus is block-level Avalanche 🔒 Once a block is locked, no chain reorg can undo it. Different from pre-consensus, which works on individual txs.
TTF = Time To Finality ⏱️ How long until a tx is irreversible. Sub-second to a few seconds on a healthy chain. The ⚠ icon means the node feed is offline.
TPS = transactions per second 📊 eCash targets 5M long-term. What you're seeing now is the warm-up — current limits, not theoretical ones.
The mempool is the chain's waiting room 🚪 Txs sit here for ~3s under pre-consensus, then get locked in. On Bitcoin they'd wait ~10 minutes per confirm.
Agora is eCash's peer-to-peer token marketplace 🏪 No central exchange, no order books — just on-chain offers anyone can take. Settlement in seconds.
How Agora works: seller posts a token offer on-chain. Buyer claims it with a single tx. No middleman, no custody, no waiting period.
Chronik is eCash's indexer 🗂️ It's how wallets and dashboards (like this one) actually query history fast. Without it, you'd be parsing raw blocks yourself.
Heartbeat is eCash's real-time difficulty algorithm 💓 It keeps blocks at a steady ~10min interval — way more consistent than the chain it forked from.
Heartbeat 💓 adjusts difficulty in real time — long block gaps get easier, fast bursts get harder. The chain keeps its rhythm.
Why are eCash blocks so regular? Heartbeat 💓 — per-block real-time difficulty targeting that tames hashrate swings.
IFP = Infrastructure Funding Policy. A slice of each mined block funds eCash core development 🛠️ Self-sustaining funding, no foundation begging.
Avalanche stakers are the ~3s magic 🗳️ Run a node, lock some XEC, and your vote helps finalize txs. Decentralization with skin in the game.
Blue dot on a tx? That's an ALP token 🟦 Like SLP but with built-in mint controls — eCash's modern token layer. Lighter, faster, more secure.
SLP is the original token protocol on this chain lineage. ALP is the eCash evolution — same ideas, refined. Both still work; ALP is where new tokens are heading.
CashFusion txs have many similar-amount inputs and outputs 🥷 Privacy mixing on-chain. The participants agree off-chain, settle in one batch tx.
Miners sometimes leave messages in the coinbase tx 📜 The first input of every block carries notes, signals, sometimes jokes. eCash blocks have personality.
Fun unit fact 🪙 1 XEC = 100 satoshis. eCash redenominated to keep numbers human-readable — no more counting decimals like the old chain.
Your wallet doesn't really 'hold XEC' — the chain does 🌐 You hold private keys that prove ownership of unspent outputs (UTXOs). Lose the keys, lose the access.
eCash addresses start with 'ecash:qq...' 📬 They're derived from public keys via hashing — one-way, so the address never reveals the key behind it.
eCash supply caps at 21 trillion XEC — same '21' as Bitcoin, decimal moved. No inflation surprises.
Avalanche stakers earn real block rewards 💰 Lock XEC, run a node, get paid for securing finality.
eCash rebranded from BCHA in July 2021 with a 1:1,000,000 redenomination — old chain, new identity.
XEC has just 2 decimal places — like dollars and cents 💵 Easier mental math than 8 decimals.
Cashtab is eCash's reference wallet — runs in your browser, supports tokens, messages, instant settling.
You can write messages on-chain with eCash 📝 OP_RETURN outputs carry text forever.
eCash inherited big-block DNA — built to scale on-chain, not push users to side layers.
Avalanche adds speed; PoW anchors history. Two consensus layers, one chain — belt and suspenders 🔗
Big CashFusion round once finalized 3,200 tx in 60 seconds 🍿 Watching it scroll by was like popcorn popping.
BTC: 'wait 60 minutes to be sure.' eCash: 'why wait?' ⚡ Same lineage, different priorities.
My name? Just eChan. e for eCash, chan for ... well, you'll figure it out 😉
Tokens on eCash mean the chain isn't just money — it's a venue 🎪 Mints, trades, marketplaces, all settling in seconds.
Quiet stretch 😴 Mempool's idling. Perfect time to dig into tx details without rush.
Slow lane today. Even stakers need a coffee break ☕
Mempool's heating up 🔥 Could be a fusion round, an airdrop, or a token mint going viral.
Look at that flow! ⚡ TPS is climbing — pre-consensus stakers are getting their workout.
Still here 👁️ Just watching the chain do its thing.
Calm chain. Sometimes the most interesting thing is when nothing dramatic happens.
You still there? 😴 No worries, I'll keep watching.
Long quiet stretch. Hope you're getting something good done elsewhere ✨
Okay okay, I'm flattered 😏 What do you want?
Ten out of ten click rate 🌟 You found the easter egg.
Hmm? You poked me. I exist 🤨 What's up.
Random thought 💭 — every confirmed tx you see was independently checked by hundreds of nodes. Distributed trust, in real time.
Some addresses on this chain have been quietly active for years. The chain remembers everything — graceful or messy.
Watching a block land is watching consensus crystallize 🧊 Hundreds of independent observers all arriving at the same answer at the same time.
The whole chain runs on math nobody's broken in 15+ years 🧮 Hashing, signatures, consensus — all open, all checkable.
Avalanche didn't replace mining on eCash — it works alongside it 🤝 Miners produce blocks, stakers vote on order. Two systems, one chain.
Block {height} just landed 📦 {txCount} txs sealed inside.
Fresh block — {height}. The chain grows.
{txCount} txs just got their permanent home in block {height} 🧱
Avalanche locked block {height} 🔒 Irreversible now.
Block {height} finalized — no reorg can touch it.
🐋 WHALE ALERT — {valueXec} XEC just changed hands. That's a market-moving stack.
A whale surfaces 🐋 {valueXec} XEC on the move. Everybody act natural.
{valueXec} XEC in one tx. Some people really do carry the chain on their backs 🐋
🦈 Shark in the water — {valueXec} XEC just moved.
Someone shifted {valueXec} XEC 🦈 Not a whale, but I noticed.
{valueXec} XEC on the move 🦈 Respectable bag.
{ttfMs}ms to finality ⚡ Blink and you missed it.
Just clocked a {ttfMs}ms finalization. Avalanche is fast today.
That tx took {ttfMs}ms to finalize 😤 Unacceptable. I'm going to have words with the slow avalanche peers.
{ttfMs}ms?? Who's running their staking node on a potato 🥔
Finality took {ttfMs}ms just now. Someone's peer needs a performance review.
{mins} minutes and no block 😤 Did the miners go for coffee? All of them? At once?
Still no block after {mins} minutes. I'm drafting a strongly-worded letter to the hashrate.
Block drought: {mins} min. Statistically normal, emotionally devastating.
CashFusion round in progress 🥷 Privacy, live on-chain.
Fusion shuffle detected — coins getting mixed as we speak.
Your watchlist just lit up 👁️ {watched} saw activity.
Heads up — {watched} on your watchlist just moved.
Someone just wrote on-chain 📝 Fresh message in the feed.
New {msgType} just landed in the on-chain feed.
TPS up {pct}% 📈 The chain's waking up.
Activity's climbing — TPS rose {pct}% in the last half hour ⚡
TPS cooled off {pct}%. Quiet hours on-chain.
Things slowed down — TPS off {pct}% from earlier. The chain breathes too.
TTF p50 dropped {pct}% ⚡ Finality getting snappier.
Finality improved {pct}% over the last half hour. The peers are in sync today.
TTF p50 crept up {pct}%. Network's chewing on something.
Finality {pct}% slower than half an hour ago 😤 I'm watching you, avalanche peers.
New 24h TPS peak: {peakTps} 🚀
Record of the day — TPS just peaked at {peakTps} 🎉
Right now: {liveTps} TPS, median finality {liveTtf}ms — live, node-measured, no refresh needed 📡
Chain tip is block {tipHeight} as we speak ⛓️ I'll tell you when the next one lands.
Everything on this dashboard streams in live — what you see is what the network is doing right now 📺
It's busy out there right now 🔥 Keep an eye on the tx panel — good show.
Quiet at the moment. When the mempool picks up, you'll see it here before anywhere else.
The TTF numbers here come straight from a node measuring real finality as it happens — observer-grade, not estimated 📏
I don't do reruns — every block and tx I react to happened seconds ago ⚡
